sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Nio ES8 delivery wait in China reduced to 13-14 weeks
feed.summary: Nio has significantly reduced the estimated delivery wait time for its ES8 SUV in China to 13-14 weeks, down from 24-26 weeks at its launch in September 2025. This reduction comes as the broader Chinese auto market enters a seasonal slowdown. The third-generation ES8 has seen substantial sales, becoming China's best-selling large SUV in December.

feed.title: Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. Extends Research and Development Collaboration with Institute Investigator at Scripps Research to Advance DNase Platform
feed.summary: Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. has extended its collaboration with The Scripps Research Institute and Dr. Alexey Stepanov for an additional four months to further develop its DNase platform. This collaboration focuses on advancing Xenetic's systemic DNase I candidate, XBIO-015, in combination with CAR T-cell therapies for various cancers, building on preclinical studies that showed significant improvements in reducing tumor burden and extending survival. The company is progressing its DNase-based technology towards Phase 1 clinical development for pancreatic carcinoma and other solid tumors.

feed.title: Understanding the Setup: (AIT) and Scalable Risk
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of Applied Industrial Technologies Inc. (NYSE: AIT) using AI models to identify potential trading opportunities and risks. It highlights strong sentiment, resistance levels, and offers three distinct trading strategies: Position Trading (Long), Momentum Breakout (Breakout), and Risk Hedging (Short), complete with entry, target, and stop-loss zones. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal insights and details the benefits of real-time AI signals for subscribers.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz: How the Heinz Dipper can Revolutionise Dipping
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has launched the "Heinz Dipper," an innovative fries box with a built-in sauce pocket, designed to prevent spills during on-the-go dining. This new product will debut in 11 countries and aims to meet changing consumer habits, where 70% of people report spilling ketchup when eating away from home. The Dipper has received positive feedback for its user-centric design, although some critics have raised concerns about space for fries and disposal.

feed.title: Fastenal Company Reports 2025 Annual and Fourth Quarter Earnings
feed.summary: Fastenal Company reported its financial results for the full year and fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, showing an 8.7% increase in net sales for the year to $8,200.5 million and an 11.1% increase for the fourth quarter to $2,027.4 million. The company achieved a 9.4% increase in net income for the year, reaching $1,258.4 million, and a 12.2% increase in the fourth quarter, totaling $294.1 million. Diluted net income per share rose to $1.09 for the year and $0.26 for the fourth quarter, reflecting strong performance driven by customer contract signings, increased unit sales, and growth in its FMI Technology deployments.

feed.title: After decades, Wells Fargo sells DTC office building to local buyer
feed.summary: Cherry Hills Village resident Craig Clark has purchased the 52,000-square-foot office building at 5700 DTC Parkway in Greenwood Village from Wells Fargo for $2.2 million. The bank will lease back the property until March 2027, giving Clark time to decide its future use, which could include headquarters for local companies, a charter school, or high-end car storage. The acquisition is part of Homeland's significant expansion of its commercial real estate portfolio, which recently grew to 1 million square feet.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive India Schedules Board Meeting for January 29, 2026 to Approve Q3FY26 Financial Results
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited will hold a board meeting on January 29, 2026, to approve its Q3FY26 unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ending December 31, 2025. This meeting adheres to SEBI Regulation 29, and the company's trading window will reopen 48 hours after the results are published. The announcement was made to BSE and NSE on January 20, 2026.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Q4 2025 earnings: CEO, CFO on investor call
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has reported its fourth-quarter 2025 results, which are available online along with an earnings supplement and slide presentation. The company's CEO and CFO will host a conference call to discuss these financial results, offering access via webcast or telephone. U.S. Bancorp, a major financial institution with approximately 70,000 employees and $695 billion in assets, serves a diverse customer base globally.

feed.title: Prudential Advisors enhances leads program with AI across lifecycle
feed.summary: Prudential Advisors has enhanced its Advisor Leads program by integrating AI and data science into its lead management process. This includes using AI to generate customer insights, prioritize high-conversion opportunities, and enrich lead profiles with third-party data. The company aims to provide financial advisors with a clearer understanding of potential clients' needs and priorities, ensuring responsible AI practices.

feed.title: News Corp reiterates $1 billion stock repurchase authorization
feed.summary: News Corp has reaffirmed its authorization to repurchase up to $1 billion of its Class A and Class B common stock. The company will provide daily disclosures of these transactions to the ASX and regular updates in its financial reports. The timing of repurchases is subject to market conditions and regulatory factors, and there's no obligation to update these statements unless legally required.

feed.title: Wells Fargo downgrades Incyte stock to Equal Weight as upgrade thesis plays out
feed.summary: Wells Fargo downgraded Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) from Overweight to Equal Weight and lowered its price target, citing that its previous upgrade thesis has largely played out. The firm noted Incyte's positive data for mutCALR ('989) and management's pipeline pruning and G&A reductions, leading to the expectation that the stock will be "range bound." Despite this downgrade, Incyte recently announced positive Phase 3 trial results for tafasitamab and approval for Minjuvi in Europe, while a board member retired.

feed.title: Bank Of America Awards $1 Bln In Stock To Employees Under Sharing Success Program
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) has announced it will award $1 billion in stock to its employees through its "Sharing Success Program," excluding senior management. This marks the ninth consecutive year for the program, bringing the total value of awards since 2017 to nearly $6.8 billion. The awards, primarily in stock, aim to align employee interests with shareholder performance and are in addition to regular compensation.

feed.title: Food Metal Cans Market Trends 2025: Sustainability, Cost
feed.summary: The global food metal cans market is projected for significant growth between 2024 and 2031, driven by increasing demands for sustainable packaging and digital supply chain investments. Key industry players like Ball Corporation and Crown Holdings are leading innovations, while regional markets in the U.S. and Japan show strong adaptation to eco-trends and material advancements. The market is segmented by material (Aluminum, Tin-coated Steel), can type (Two-Piece, Three-Piece), and application (Bakery & Confectionery, Meat Products, Fruits & Vegetables, Edible Oils).

feed.title: D.R. Horton reports 30% drop in Q1 net income as housing market cools
feed.summary: D.R. Horton, the largest U.S. homebuilder, reported a 30% drop in Q1 fiscal 2026 net income to $594.8 million ($2.03 per diluted share), influenced by affordability concerns and cautious consumer sentiment. The company's revenues decreased, but net sales orders increased by 3%, indicating some market resilience. Despite the income decline, D.R. Horton maintained its fiscal 2026 guidance and continued its shareholder return program, repurchasing shares and paying dividends.

feed.title: KeyCorp names two new directors, appoints lead independent director
feed.summary: KeyCorp announced changes to its board of directors, including the nomination of Antonio DeSpirito and Christopher Henson as new members and the appointment of Todd Vasos as lead independent director. These changes follow a search process, maintaining a board of 14 directors, and represent eight new appointments over the last six years. Carlton Highsmith and Ruth Ann Gillis will retire from the board at the 2026 annual meeting.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL Shares Purchased by Kingswood Wealth Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Kingswood Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 6.1% in the third quarter of 2025, bringing its total holdings to 61,123 shares valued at approximately $14.86 million. This increase reflects growing investor enthusiasm for Alphabet's AI and cloud initiatives, which have propelled its valuation towards $4 trillion and garnered positive analyst revisions. Despite insider selling, the company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $326.31.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL Shares Acquired by Trevian Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Trevian Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Alphabet (GOOGL) by 53.9% in Q3, now holding 6,494 shares worth $1.579 million. Despite this institutional buying and Alphabet's near $4 trillion valuation driven by AI momentum and Google Cloud growth, insider selling has accelerated, with CEO Sundar Pichai selling shares worth over $10 million. Analysts maintain a generally bullish outlook on Alphabet, with an average price target of $326.31.

feed.title: Steigerwald Gordon & Koch Inc. Purchases 9,064 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Steigerwald Gordon & Koch Inc. has increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 11.8% in Q3, purchasing 9,064 additional shares to hold a total of 85,783 shares valued at approximately $20.85 million. The investment now represents 2.0% of the firm's portfolio. Despite significant insider selling totaling $57.9 million in the last 90 days, institutional sentiment remains largely positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $326.31, driven by Alphabet's strong AI momentum and market capitalization approaching $4 trillion.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL is Peregrine Capital Management LLC's 2nd Largest Position
feed.summary: Peregrine Capital Management LLC significantly cut its stake in Alphabet (GOOGL) by 1.8% in Q3, yet it remains their second-largest position, valued at $120.22 million, representing 3.6% of their portfolio. Analyst sentiment for Alphabet is largely positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $326.31, following several recent upgrades. Despite insider selling, institutional ownership is strong at 40.03%, driven by the company's AI momentum and Google Cloud's potential as a major profit driver, although competition and sector rotation present risks.

feed.title: KeyCorp Board of Directors Update
feed.summary: KeyCorp has announced significant changes to its Board of Directors, including the nomination of Antonio DeSpirito and Christopher Henson for election at the 2026 Annual Meeting. Todd Vasos has been appointed Lead Independent Director, succeeding Alexander M. Cutler. Additionally, Carlton Highsmith and Ruth Ann Gillis will retire from the Board, maintaining the board size at 14 directors, and reinforcing the company's commitment to strong corporate governance and shareholder value.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Has $3.70 Million Stock Position in AutoZone, Inc. $AZO
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) by 59.6% in Q3, now holding 862 shares valued at $3.7 million. This comes despite recent insider stock sales totaling approximately $1.15 million and AutoZone missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $4,264.12.

feed.title: Silvercorp Metals, Hecla Mining, Other Silver Stocks Surge In Tuesday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
feed.summary: Silvercorp Metals, Hecla Mining, First Majestic Silver, and Endeavour Silver all saw their stock prices surge in pre-market trading, driven by a rally in silver prices that pushed spot silver above $95. This increase is attributed to geopolitical uncertainties, including President Trump's Greenland push, and surging demand for silver in AI and solar technologies. Economist Peter Schiff, however, warns that this metals rally could be a sign of deeper financial troubles, comparing it to the 2007 subprime mortgage crisis.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT is JARISLOWSKY FRASER Ltd's 7th Largest Position
feed.summary: JARISLOWSKY FRASER Ltd reduced its stake in Microsoft by 8.6% in Q3, making it their 7th largest holding. Despite this, Microsoft exceeded quarterly estimates with strong EPS and revenue growth, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating. Insider selling has occurred, but institutional ownership remains high, with positive sentiment around Microsoft's AI and cloud leadership.

feed.title: 3M Co. (MMM) Tops Q4 EPS by 3c, Beats on Revenue; Offers Guidance
feed.summary: 3M Co. (MMM) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share (EPS) and revenue. The company posted Q4 EPS of $1.83, 3 cents higher than the estimated $1.80, and revenue reached $6.1 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $6.01 billion. Additionally, 3M provided its FY2026 EPS guidance, projecting $8.50-$8.70, which brackets the analyst consensus of $8.61.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Tops Q4 EPS by 4c
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) reported strong fourth-quarter results, with EPS of $1.04, surpassing analyst estimates by $0.04. The company's revenue for the quarter was $2.34 billion, aligning with the consensus estimate. This financial performance indicates a positive quarter for the banking institution.

feed.title: D.R. Horton, Inc., America’s Builder, Reports Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Earnings and Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.45 Per Share
feed.summary: D.R. Horton, Inc. reported its fiscal first-quarter 2026 results, including net income of $594.8 million ($2.03 per diluted share) and consolidated revenues of $6.9 billion. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share and reiterated its fiscal 2026 guidance, expecting consolidated revenues between $33.5 billion and $35.0 billion. Despite affordability concerns impacting demand, D.R. Horton emphasized its strong financial position, low leverage, and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $868,000 Stock Position in Citizens Financial Group, Inc. $CFG
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly reduced its stake in Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) by 97.3% in Q3, selling 588,507 shares and retaining 16,327 shares valued at $868,000. Despite this reduction, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for CFG, with an average target price of $60.33, following recent upgrades from Citigroup and Bank of America. Other institutional investors, including NewEdge Advisors LLC and Empowered Funds LLC, increased their positions in the bank during recent quarters.

feed.title: Jackson Thornton Wealth Management LLC Boosts Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Jackson Thornton Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 258.3% in Q3, now holding 13,881 shares valued at $1.43 million, contributing to institutions owning 26.76% of the company. Despite positive analyst ratings and Q3 earnings surpassing estimates, insider selling of roughly 135,215 shares ($15.1 million) has occurred in the past three months. Walmart's stock recently traded up 0.4%, with a market cap of $954.03 billion, and the company has issued FY2026 EPS guidance between $2.58 and $2.63.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Purchases 1,457 Shares of United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE:URI) by 113.7% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 1,457 shares to bring its total holdings to 2,739 shares valued at $2.615 million. This move comes as other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the construction company. United Rentals reported Q3 EPS of $11.70, missing estimates, but revenue rose 5.9% to $4.23 billion, and the company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.79.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Has $3.27 Million Holdings in American Express Company $AXP
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in American Express (NYSE:AXP) by 71.3%, now holding 9,857 shares valued at approximately $3.27 million. This increase comes despite American Express reporting a substantial quarterly earnings miss and insider share sales totaling over $20 million recently. Institutional investors hold a large portion of the stock, while analysts have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $352.82.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Grows Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Uber Technologies, Inc. by 153.3% in Q3, now holding 52,912 shares valued at approximately $5.18 million. Despite bullish analyst ratings, a "Moderate Buy" consensus, and a strong quarterly earnings beat, Uber faces legal and reputational risks from sexual assault claims and service animal complaints, along with recent insider stock sales. Institutional investors collectively own over 80% of the company, which continues to expand its global ride-sharing and delivery platform.

feed.title: Penobscot Investment Management Company Inc. Boosts Stock Position in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Penobscot Investment Management Company Inc. increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) by 3.1% in the third quarter, making it their third-largest holding. Microsoft's stock shows strong performance with a $3.42 trillion market cap, positive earnings, and significant growth driven by AI advancements, despite some analyst concerns regarding valuation and legal risks. Institutional investors hold 71.13% of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $630.37.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Diluted Earnings Per Share of $1.04
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, with diluted earnings per share of $1.04, an increase from $0.91 in the prior quarter and $0.85 in the year-ago quarter. The company achieved record Net Interest Income (NII) of $6 billion for the full year, along with significant growth in consumer households and assets under management. These positive results were attributed to continued business momentum, improved credit trends, and disciplined expense management, positioning the bank favorably for its upcoming acquisition of Comerica.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Acquires 9,622 Shares of Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC has increased its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) by 53.0%, acquiring an additional 9,622 shares to now hold a total of 27,772 shares valued at $4.505 million. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with investors owning 78.63% of PM's stock. Philip Morris recently exceeded Q3 earnings estimates and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $189.

feed.title: Braveboy: National Harbor Sphere revenues would ‘dwarf’ those from Commanders, Six Flags
feed.summary: Prince George's County Executive Aisha Braveboy stated that the proposed Sphere entertainment venue at National Harbor would generate significantly more revenue than the combined earnings from the Washington Commanders and Six Flags. The "smaller" Sphere, about one-third the size of the Las Vegas original and costing over $1 billion, aims to boost the county's economy and create thousands of jobs, despite budget constraints and recent economic challenges like the Commanders' departure and Six Flags' closure. The project requires state and county financial backing, including $170 million from the county, and is still awaiting final approvals.

feed.title: BofA Awards $1 Billion in Stock through Sharing Success Program to Non-Executive Employees
feed.summary: Bank of America announced it will award $1 billion in stock to its non-executive employees through its Sharing Success Program, marking the ninth consecutive year of such awards and bringing the total to nearly $6.8 billion since 2017. Approximately 96% of employees are eligible for these awards, which are in addition to regular compensation and aim to align employee interests with the company's long-term performance. This initiative underscores Bank of America's commitment to its employees and follows other investments such as raising the minimum hourly wage to $25 and expanding skills-based hiring.

feed.title: Bank of America opens $1B stock pool to 96% of its staff
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) announced a $1 billion "Sharing Success" equity award for non-executive employees, marking the ninth consecutive year of the program. This award, equivalent to nearly 19 million shares, makes approximately 96% of its workforce eligible to receive stock. The initiative underscores the company's commitment to employee retention, alignment with shareholder interests, and reflects recent investments like raising the U.S. minimum wage to $25 per hour.

feed.title: 3M Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results; Initiates Full-Year 2026 Financial Guidance
feed.summary: 3M (NYSE: MMM) has reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, along with initial financial guidance for 2026. For Q4 2025, the company achieved GAAP sales of $6.1 billion, with adjusted sales of $6.0 billion and adjusted EPS of $1.83, up 9% year-on-year. Full-year 2025 saw GAAP sales of $24.9 billion, adjusted sales of $24.3 billion, and adjusted EPS of $8.06, an increase of 10% year-on-year, driven by strong margin expansion and cash conversion. Looking ahead to 2026, 3M anticipates adjusted total sales growth of approximately 4%, adjusted organic sales growth of about 3%, and adjusted EPS in the range of $8.50 to $8.70.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Grows Position in Booking Holdings Inc. $BKNG
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) by 229.6% in Q3, now holding 412 shares valued at $2.224 million. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates with EPS of $99.50 and revenue of $9.01 billion, marking a 12.7% year-over-year increase. Despite insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price near $6,225, and Booking Holdings offers a $9.60 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: This Intel Analyst Is No Longer Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Tuesday
feed.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have upgraded their ratings for five major companies, including Intel Corporation, Enphase Energy, Progyny Inc., Brinker International, and Shake Shack Inc. Notable upgrades include Goldman Sachs moving Enphase Energy to Buy, HSBC upgrading Intel to Hold, and Morgan Stanley upgrading Brinker International and Shake Shack to Overweight. These changes reflect a more positive outlook from the analysts on these stocks.

feed.title: 46,618 Shares in Newmont Corporation $NEM Bought by Dynasty Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC has acquired 46,618 shares of Newmont Corporation (NEM) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $3.93 million. This comes as other institutional investors, including Norges Bank and Invesco Ltd., have also significantly increased their holdings in the gold mining company. Newmont recently reported strong third-quarter earnings with EPS of $1.71 and revenue of $5.52 billion, exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: Moderna, Merck's skin cancer vaccine shows sustained benefit after five years
feed.summary: Moderna and Merck announced that their experimental skin cancer vaccine, when used with Keytruda, sustained a 49% reduction in the risk of recurrence or death for melanoma patients in a mid-stage trial after five years. This sustained benefit is consistent with data reported at the three-year mark. The companies are now conducting eight larger studies to test the combination treatment in other cancer types.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Has $2.65 Million Holdings in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in General Dynamics Corporation, acquiring 3,273 additional shares to hold a total of 7,778 shares valued at approximately $2.65 million. This contrasts with VP David Paddock's recent sale of over 20,000 shares for $6.82 million. General Dynamics reported strong Q3 results, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $366.70.

feed.title: TVA Rebates 10,000 Heat Pump Water Heaters in Q4 of 2025, Showing a Wildly Successful Model
feed.summary: The Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) successfully rebated over 10,000 heat pump water heaters (HPWHs) in Q4 2025, significantly exceeding expectations through a "midstream" incentive model. After initial struggles with upstream and downstream models, TVA's pivot to directly incentivizing distributors and retailers with a $1,300 discount and simplified processes led to remarkable growth and market shift. This success demonstrates the effectiveness of strong rebates and smart program design in accelerating HPWH adoption.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Invests $2.06 Million in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC has invested $2.06 million in L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) by acquiring 6,735 shares in the third quarter. This comes as institutional ownership in L3Harris is significant, and analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating for the stock, with an average target price of $315.73. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and provided positive FY2025 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC Buys 9,812 Shares of Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC
feed.summary: Dynasty Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) by 134.8% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 9,812 shares. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in MPC, which currently trades with a market cap of $52.76 billion and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend and reported Q3 earnings that beat analyst estimates.

feed.title: KKR strengthens stake in Altavair
feed.summary: KKR, a global investment firm, is increasing its ownership stake in Altavair, a commercial aviation leasing and financing company, and its sister company, AV AirFinance. This investment, funded from KKR's balance sheet, deepens a strategic partnership launched in 2018, during which KKR-managed funds have committed over $5 billion to aircraft leasing and lending. The move aims to support Altavair's continued growth and response to evolving airline fleet needs, with key leadership promotions announced within Altavair.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Points Out Split in Salesforce (CRM)'s Business
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted a split in Salesforce's business, noting that while its agentic business is performing well, the broader software sector turmoil is negatively impacting the stock. Despite this, Wolfe Research maintained an Outperform rating with a $350 price target, citing tailwinds from Salesforce's AI portfolio. Barclays also raised its price target to $338 with an Overweight rating.

feed.title: Is 2026 the Year to Buy American Express Stock?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether 2026 is a good year to invest in American Express (AXP) stock. It highlights American Express's strong brand, premium offerings, and network effect as key strengths, which have led to consistent revenue and profit growth. However, the author advises caution due to the stock's current valuation, suggesting investors wait for a price-to-earnings ratio below 20 before buying.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Shares Trading Strategy For Goldman Sachs (GS)'s Shares
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed the trading strategy for Goldman Sachs (GS) shares, noting a current market narrative concerning high expenses despite CEO David Solomon's optimistic outlook on M&A and IPO activity. Cramer suggests an alternative approach for banking stocks: buying them when they are down rather than selling on news, as is common practice. He acknowledges Goldman Sachs' potential but suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater returns with limited downside risk.
